tipRules.tip: Hackney: 'Generally uses braid even in clear water when swimming jigs over and in milfoil beds. Won a Bassmaster Elite event on Cayuga Lake in New York using braid in clear water over milfoil.'

knowledge.insight: Hackney: 'Uses braid even in clear water when swimming jigs. As long as it is a moving bait, line type doesn't seem to matter — bass chomp regardless.'
